overall.description: A TIE fighter departs from orbit around a teal-colored planet and cruises through deep space, passing a large nebula structure and distant ships before continuing into empty starfield. The footage appears to be from a Star Wars video game or CGI cinematic with high-quality space rendering.

segments.scene_description: The TIE fighter departs from orbit around a large teal planet, with the planet dominating the left side of the frame before exiting as the ship enters the darkness of open space.

segments.scene_description: The TIE fighter travels through deep space, passing a large teal nebula that enters from the left and gradually moves past the camera. Distant ships are visible ahead as the fighter cruises through the cosmic structure.

agents.ego_description: TIE fighter continuing cruise through empty starfield, gradually moving further from camera

segments.scene_description: With the nebula behind, the TIE fighter continues its journey through empty deep space, becoming smaller as it travels further into the darkness with only sparse stars visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a TIE fighter departs from a planetary orbit and ventures deep into the void of space. It begins with the ship moving away from a massive teal planet that dominates the left side of the frame before the horizon vanishes into the darkness of open space. As the fighter cruises forward, the environment shifts to reveal a sprawling teal nebula that glides past the camera, momentarily illuminating distant ships ahead. The scene then opens into a vast, empty starfield as the cosmic structure recedes into the background. Finally, the TIE fighter continues its journey into the deep black, growing smaller and more isolated against a backdrop of sparse, distant stars.
